Episodes.Title: Miracle Escape
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Lorry Ayers, Mark Caven
Episodes.Plot: An Air France airliner overruns the runway while attempting to land at Toronto in bad weather. The plane ends up in a small ravine and starts burning, but all the passengers are quickly and safely evacuated.

Episodes.Title: Falling from the Sky
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, David Rosser, Adam Weiner
Episodes.Plot: While en route from Malaysia to Australia, all four engines off a British Airways 747 fail. Now the crew must divert to Indonesia. Will they make it? And why did the engines fail and left British Airways Flight 9 "Falling from the...

Episodes.Title: Fire Fight
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Gail Gallant
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Martin Evans, Eric Murphy
Episodes.Plot: Fire breaks out on Air Canada flight 797 at 35,000 feet. Can the crew get the wheels on the ground before the fire consumes the plane?

Episodes.Title: Hidden Danger
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Henry Alessandroni, Philippa Domville
Episodes.Plot: The crashes of United Airlines flight 585 and USAir flight 427 confound investigators for 10 years until they catch a lucky break, which allows them to solve the long overdue puzzle.

Episodes.Title: Panic Over the Pacific
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Frank Nakashima, Dominic Fung
Episodes.Plot: A China Airlines passenger jet goes out of control over the Pacific Ocean on a flight to Los Angeles. The extreme forces cause extensive damage to the aircraft, but the pilots regain control and safely land the 747 at San Francisco.

Episodes.Title: Out of Sight
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Charles E. Anderson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Todd Campbell, Kevin Hare
Episodes.Plot: A badly damaged Aeroméxico DC-9 crashes into a residential neighborhood of Cerritos, California, after being hit by a privately owned Piper light aircraft not seen by the air traffic controller.

Episodes.Title: Fog of War
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Dennis Murphy
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Steve Cumyn, Jeff White
Episodes.Plot: In 1996, a USAF plane carrying US Secretary of Commerce Ron Brown crashes into a mountain while attempting an instrument approach to a war-torn Dubrovnik Airport in southern Croatia.

Episodes.Title: Vertigo
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Frank Pellegrino, Anousha Alamian
Episodes.Plot: What brought Flash Flight 604 down? Was it turbulence, technical problem, lightning strike? Or simply the most dreaded factor of them all, the human factor?

Episodes.Title: Ghost Plane
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Dusan Dukic, Sally Golan
Episodes.Plot: Air traffic controllers lose contact to a Cypriot airliner flying towards Athens, Greece. Two F-16s are scrambled to investigate, but the plane soon crashes into a mountain.
